mapper.insert:
insert into DSM_SOURCE_FIELD_INFO (SourceInfoID, id, tableId, resourceId, fieldName, fieldDescription, fieldType, fieldLength, isNonnull, isDeleted, isPrimarykey, isForeignKey, insertTime, updateTime, databaseUrl, schemeId, fieldSourceType, fieldCode, gadsjFieldId, determinerId, elementId)
(#{item.sourceInfoID}, #{item.recno}, #{item.tableId}, #{item.resourceId}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.fieldDescription}, #{item.fieldType}, #{item.fieldLength}, #{item.isNonnull}, #{item.isDeleted}, #{item.isPrimarykey}, #{item.isForeignKey}, #{item.insertTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.databaseUrl}, #{item.schemeId}, #{item.fieldSourceType}, #{item.fieldCode}, #{item.gadsjFieldId}, #{item.determinerId}, #{item.elementId})
